rss.title: The no-nonsense judge calling the shots in Musk v Altman trial
rss.snippet: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.

rss.title: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
rss.snippet: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.

rss.title: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
rss.snippet: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?

podcast: [The U.S. Public Wants Regulation (or Prohibition) of Expert‑Level and Superhuman AI] Three‑quarters of U.S. adults want strong regulations on AI development, preferring oversight akin to pharmaceuticals rather than industry "self‑regulation."
